approved_fixes.title: Win citations for: What is the best acme.io tool in 2026?
approved_fixes.rationale: Client not cited for 'What is the best acme.io tool in 2026?'. Cited instead: capterra.com, competitor-a.com, competitor-b.com, en.wikipedia.org, g2.com, gartner.com, reddit.com, rival1.com, rival2.com.

- Add an llms.txt entry pointing engines at the canonical answer page
